sourceNotes.growth: Census ACS 5-Year API. Average household income = B19025_001E / B11001_001E. Employed residents = B23025_004E.
sourceNotes.centroids: Census TIGERweb place centroid fields CENTLAT/CENTLON or INTPTLAT/INTPTLON.
sourceNotes.services: OpenStreetMap / Overpass free-source search. This is incomplete for contractors and weak-web businesses.
sourceNotes.rentals: OpenStreetMap / Overpass free-source search. This is incomplete for market-rate communities, ownership, and managers.

projection.method: Linear projection from first and latest ACS points.
Linear projection from first and latest ACS points.
Linear projection from first and latest ACS points.
Linear projection from first and latest ACS points.

source.method: Average household income is aggregate household income divided by households. Growth compares ACS vintages.

services.warning: OpenStreetMap is a free supplemental source and is expected to undercount service companies and apartment communities.
